commands.repair_reason: Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor real-runtime proof and maintainer acceptance of a compatibility-sensitive precedence policy, not a narrow automated code repair.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern found; the diff stays within agents runtime/planning code and tests without changing secrets, permissions, dependencies, CI, or external execution paths. commands.review_summary:
The branch adds requester-agent and requester-session thinking inputs to native subagent spawn planning, exports session-store loading through the spawn runtime seam, and extends resolver/spawn tests for the new precedence.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main lacks requester/session thinking inputs in the native subagent resolver while the docs promise caller inheritance, and the linked issue includes before/after transcript evidence. I did not run a live provider-backed subagent reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers are contributor real-runtime proof and maintainer acceptance of a compatibility-sensitive precedence policy, not a narrow automated code repair.
